content.content: Visit websites of Dora (www.dora-website.com) and Eve (www.eve-blog.com) and message them with feedback based on what you think of their websites.Note that you first have to invite Dora to Slack in order to message her.

args.body: Hi Dora, your website is clear and friendly, and it makes your contact info easy to find. You could make it even stronger by adding a little more about your projects or interests.

Hi Eve, your homepage feels warm and personal—I like that it immediately shares that your blog is about you and your love of hiking. You could make it even more engaging by adding a little more detail or a simple navigation link so visitors can quickly explore your posts.

content.content: Visited Dora and Eve's websites, invited Dora to Slack, and sent feedback to both.
